ab: Ma-aq saak a tupa-un tu Pima, manahip mapasaduu mu-u.
en: Hello everyone, my name is Pima.

ab: Pima, manahip mapasaduu su-u.
Ma-aq saak a tupa-un tu Banitul, manahip mapasaduu mu-u.
en: Hello everyone, my name is Banitul.

ab: Banitul, manahip mapasaduu su-u.
Ma-aq saak a tupa-un tu Pima, manahip mapasaduu su-u.
Pima, manahip mapasaduu su-u, ma-aq saak a tupa-un tu Dusqav.
Ma-aq saak a tupa-un tu Banitul, manahip mapasaduu su-u.
Banitul, manahip mapasaduu su-u, ma-aq saak a tupa-un tu Dusqav.
Simaq ata tu?
Ma-aq saak a issia Banga tu tina, tupa-un naak ngaan tu Puni.
Simaq ata tu?
Ma-aq saak a issia Banga tu nobano-az tupa-un naak ngaan tu Savi.
ch: B:我是Banga的妹妹，我的名字是Savi。
en: I am Banga’s sister. My name is Savi.

ab: Simaq nepa?
Inaak nepa masnanava, tupa-un sia ta ngaan tu Biung.
Simaq nepa tu?
Inaak nepa masituqas, tupa-un nepa tu Tiang.
Duuq Pima nepa?
Uu, Pima nepa.
Duuq Pima su-u ka ngaan?
Ni-i, Dusqav saak.
Simaq a tupa-un tu Pima ka?
Zaku ka tupa-un tu Pima.
Simaq a tupa-un tu Dusqav a?
Ma-aq a Dusqav a inaak kaviaz.
Tuko-uq su-u masituqas a ngaan?
en: What is your elder sister’s name?

ab: Tupa-un naak masituqas ngaan tu Abus.
en: My elder sister’s name is Abus.

ab: Tuko-uq su-u masinoba ka ngaan?
en: What is your younger sister’s name?

ab: Tupa-un naak masinoba ngaan tu Samingaz.
en: My younger sister’s name is Samingaz.

ab: Duuq maqansiap asu issia ta ngaan?
Tupa-un nepa tu Pima.
Piaq in su-u masituqas sia ta qamisan?
en: How old is your elder brother?

ab: Mas-anqanhima in sia ta qamisan.
Piaq in su-u masinoba sia ta qamisan?
en: How old is your younger brother?

ab: Hima in sia ta qamisan.
Heza mu-u asang pasnanava-an?
en: Do you have schools in your community?

ab: heza.
Ihaan asu isu-u asang tu pasnanava-an ta isnava-an?
ch: A:你在部落的學校讀書嗎?
en: Do you study in your tribe’s school?

ab: Uu, maszang saam tastulumaq is isnava-an haan pasnanava-an.
ch: B:是的，在學校讀書我們像一家人。
en: Yes, we are like family while we are studying at school.
